---
title: "Samarth Sheth"
subtitle: ""
pagetitle: "Samarth Sheth"
page-layout: article
toc: false
include-in-header:
  text: |
    <script>document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", () => document.body.classList.add("page-home"));</script>
---

::: {.home-simple}

::: {.home-text}
# Samarth Sheth

I'm finishing an M.A. in Mathematics at UW–Madison, after studying Mathematics and Physics at UC Berkeley for my undergrad.

<!-- maybe talk about interests -->

<!-- 
::: {.home-links}
[Projects](projects/index.qmd)  
[Writing](blog/index.qmd)  
[CV](cv.qmd)  
[GitHub](https://github.com/SamarthSheth)  
[LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/samarth-sheth/)  
[Email](mailto:samarth.sheth@hotmail.com)
:::

-->
:::

::: {.home-photo-wrap}
![](images/headshot.jpg){.home-photo}
:::


:::
